forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '80'
+title: 'shelltool init/deinit: match sah for --local and --user scopes'
+---
+`shelltool` init/deinit does not match `sah`'s scope handling for `--local` and `--user`. Two concrete gaps found by comparing `apps/shelltool-cli/src/commands/registry.rs` against `apps/swissarmyhammer-cli/src/commands/install/components/mod.rs`.
+
+**Gap 1 — `--local` is not actually local for MCP registration.**
+`sah` registers a dedicated `ClaudeLocalScope` component (`is_applicable = Local` only, priority 11) that writes the MCP entry into `~/.claude.json` under `projects.<cwd>.mcpServers` — which is the very definition of `InitScope::Local` (`swissarmyhammer-common/src/lifecycle.rs:19-20`).
+`shelltool` has no equivalent. `ShelltoolMcpRegistration` uses `global = matches!(scope, User)`, so `Local` collapses into `Project` → writes the committed project `.mcp.json` via `agent_project_mcp_config`. Result: `shelltool init --local` never touches `~/.claude.json` and behaves identically to `--project`, contradicting the meaning of `Local`.
+- Note: shelltool's *Bash-deny* side IS local-aware (`scope.claude_settings_path()` → `.claude/settings.local.json`). Only the MCP registration is wrong.
+
+**Fix 1:** Add a `ShelltoolClaudeLocalScope` component (`is_applicable = Local` only) mirroring sah's `ClaudeLocalScope` — write/remove the `shelltool` entry in `~/.claude.json` under `projects.<project-key>.mcpServers`, pruning the empty `mcpServers` object on deinit. Reuse `mirdan::mcp_config::{claude_json_path, project_key, ensure_project_entry, set_mcp_server_entry, remove_mcp_server_entry}`.
+
+**Gap 2 — `--user` skips the Bash deny.**
+`ShellExecuteTool` bundles project-only `.shell/config.yaml` creation with the Bash-deny step under one `is_applicable = Project | Local` (excludes User). So `shelltool init --user` registers the MCP server globally but never denies Bash in `~/.claude/settings.json`. `sah`'s `DenyBash` applies to `Project | Local | User`. A user-scope shelltool install therefore leaves Bash allowed everywhere — undercutting shelltool's "use the shell tool instead of Bash" premise at the one scope where it matters most.
+
+**Fix 2:** Split the Bash-deny out of `ShellExecuteTool` into its own component (or widen scope handling) so the deny runs at `User` scope too — writing `~/.claude/settings.json` via `scope.claude_settings_path()` — while the `.shell/config.yaml` creation stays Project|Local only.
+
+**Verification (real-path tests required):**
+- `shelltool init --local` writes `shelltool` into `~/.claude.json` projects.<cwd>.mcpServers (NOT a committed `.mcp.json`); deinit removes it and prunes empty `mcpServers`.
+- `shelltool init --user` adds `"Bash"` to `~/.claude/settings.json` permissions.deny; deinit removes it.
+- Update the `registry.len()` assertion in `registry.rs` tests (currently expects 3).
+- Use `IsolatedTestEnvironment` + `CurrentDirGuard` + `#[serial(cwd)]` per existing test isolation pattern in this crate.
+
+Source refs:
+- sah components: apps/swissarmyhammer-cli/src/commands/install/components/mod.rs (ClaudeLocalScope ~277-408, DenyBash ~443-507)
+- shelltool registry: apps/shelltool-cli/src/commands/registry.rs
+- ShellExecuteTool lifecycle: crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/mod.rs:423-498
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -3,29 +3,47 @@
 - claude-code
 position_column: doing
 position_ordinal: '80'
-title: 'shelltool init/deinit: match sah for --local and --user scopes'
+title: 'shelltool/sah init: tool owns lifecycle, mirdan merges agent config per scope'
 ---
-`shelltool` init/deinit does not match `sah`'s scope handling for `--local` and `--user`. Two concrete gaps found by comparing `apps/shelltool-cli/src/commands/registry.rs` against `apps/swissarmyhammer-cli/src/commands/install/components/mod.rs`.
+Make the **tool** the unit of `Initializable` that owns its full install lifecycle across **User/Local/Project**, with the **CLI injecting the MCP server entry**, and **mirdan as the single understander/merger of agent config per scope** (no duplicated scope logic).
+
+## Decisions (from user)
+1. Tool owns everything (incl. MCP registration); CLI injects the `McpServerEntry`.
+2. Three real scopes: User, Local, Project.
+3. mirdan owns the per-scope agent-config read/merge/write/prune. The tool and sah both call mirdan — never reimplement.
+
+## Scope → target mapping
+- **User**   → agent global MCP config (e.g. `~/.claude.json` global `mcpServers`) + `~/.claude/settings.json` Bash-deny. NO `.shell/config.yaml`.
+- **Project**→ agent project MCP config (`.mcp.json`, committed) + `.claude/settings.json` Bash-deny + `.shell/config.yaml`.
+- **Local**  → `~/.claude.json` under `projects.<project_key>.mcpServers` (private) + `.claude/settings.local.json` Bash-deny + `.shell/config.yaml`.

-**Gap 1 — `--local` is not actually local for MCP registration.**
-`sah` registers a dedicated `ClaudeLocalScope` component (`is_applicable = Local` only, priority 11) that writes the MCP entry into `~/.claude.json` under `projects.<cwd>.mcpServers` — which is the very definition of `InitScope::Local` (`swissarmyhammer-common/src/lifecycle.rs:19-20`).
-`shelltool` has no equivalent. `ShelltoolMcpRegistration` uses `global = matches!(scope, User)`, so `Local` collapses into `Project` → writes the committed project `.mcp.json` via `agent_project_mcp_config`. Result: `shelltool init --local` never touches `~/.claude.json` and behaves identically to `--project`, contradicting the meaning of `Local`.
-- Note: shelltool's *Bash-deny* side IS local-aware (`scope.claude_settings_path()` → `.claude/settings.local.json`). Only the MCP registration is wrong.
+## 1. mirdan = merger (crates/mirdan/src/mcp_config.rs)
+Add scope-aware, reusable API (pure where possible; explicit path+key args for testability):
+- `set_mcp_local_scope(claude_json: &Path, project_key: &str, server_name, entry, extras) -> Result<bool>` — read → `ensure_project_entry` → `set_mcp_server_entry` under `mcpServers` → write. Returns changed.
+- `remove_mcp_local_scope(claude_json: &Path, project_key: &str, server_name) -> Result<bool>` — read → remove entry → prune now-empty `mcpServers` object → write. Returns changed.
+- MOVE sah's private `remove_mcp_from_project_entry` prune logic into mirdan as the shared impl.
+- (User/Project keep using existing `register_mcp_server`/`unregister_mcp_server` + `agent_global_mcp_config`/`agent_project_mcp_config`.)
+- Unit tests in mirdan with tempfile for set/remove/prune.

-**Fix 1:** Add a `ShelltoolClaudeLocalScope` component (`is_applicable = Local` only) mirroring sah's `ClaudeLocalScope` — write/remove the `shelltool` entry in `~/.claude.json` under `projects.<project-key>.mcpServers`, pruning the empty `mcpServers` object on deinit. Reuse `mirdan::mcp_config::{claude_json_path, project_key, ensure_project_entry, set_mcp_server_entry, remove_mcp_server_entry}`.
+## 2. Tool owns lifecycle (crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/mod.rs)
+- Add field `mcp_server: Option<(String /*name*/, mirdan::mcp_config::McpServerEntry)>` + builder `with_mcp_server(name, entry)`. `new()` → None (serve path unaffected).
+- `Initializable::is_applicable` → `User | Local | Project` (was `Project | Local`).
+- `init(scope)`: if `Some((name,entry))` register via mirdan per scope (User→each detected agent global cfg; Project→each agent project cfg; Local→`set_mcp_local_scope`). Then Bash-deny at `scope.claude_settings_path()` for ALL scopes. Then `.shell/config.yaml` only for Project|Local (skip User).
+- `deinit(scope)`: mirror — unregister per scope (Local→`remove_mcp_local_scope`), remove Bash-deny at scope path, remove `.shell/` only for Project|Local.

-**Gap 2 — `--user` skips the Bash deny.**
-`ShellExecuteTool` bundles project-only `.shell/config.yaml` creation with the Bash-deny step under one `is_applicable = Project | Local` (excludes User). So `shelltool init --user` registers the MCP server globally but never denies Bash in `~/.claude/settings.json`. `sah`'s `DenyBash` applies to `Project | Local | User`. A user-scope shelltool install therefore leaves Bash allowed everywhere — undercutting shelltool's "use the shell tool instead of Bash" premise at the one scope where it matters most.
+## 3. shelltool CLI asks the tool (apps/shelltool-cli/src/commands/registry.rs)
+- `register_all`: register `ShellExecuteTool::with_mcp_server("shelltool", {command:"shelltool", args:["serve"]})` + `ShelltoolSkillDeployment`.
+- DELETE `ShelltoolMcpRegistration` (its logic now lives in the tool + mirdan). Update `registry.len()` test (3 → 2) and the register-success-path test to drive the tool.

-**Fix 2:** Split the Bash-deny out of `ShellExecuteTool` into its own component (or widen scope handling) so the deny runs at `User` scope too — writing `~/.claude/settings.json` via `scope.claude_settings_path()` — while the `.shell/config.yaml` creation stays Project|Local only.
+## 4. sah uses the same mirdan merger (apps/swissarmyhammer-cli/src/commands/install/components/mod.rs)
+- Refactor `ClaudeLocalScope::init/deinit` to call `mirdan::mcp_config::{set_mcp_local_scope, remove_mcp_local_scope}`. Remove the now-moved private prune helper. Behavior unchanged; proves no duplication ("as should sah").

-**Verification (real-path tests required):**
-- `shelltool init --local` writes `shelltool` into `~/.claude.json` projects.<cwd>.mcpServers (NOT a committed `.mcp.json`); deinit removes it and prunes empty `mcpServers`.
-- `shelltool init --user` adds `"Bash"` to `~/.claude/settings.json` permissions.deny; deinit removes it.
-- Update the `registry.len()` assertion in `registry.rs` tests (currently expects 3).
-- Use `IsolatedTestEnvironment` + `CurrentDirGuard` + `#[serial(cwd)]` per existing test isolation pattern in this crate.
+## Verification (real-path tests, IsolatedTestEnvironment + CurrentDirGuard + #[serial(cwd)])
+- Tool `init`/`deinit` at User: `~/.claude/settings.json` Bash-deny added/removed; agent global MCP entry written/removed; NO `.shell/`.
+- Tool at Local: `~/.claude.json` `projects.<cwd>.mcpServers.shelltool` written; `.claude/settings.local.json` deny; deinit removes + prunes empty `mcpServers`.
+- Tool at Project: `.mcp.json` entry; `.claude/settings.json` deny; `.shell/config.yaml` created.
+- mirdan local-scope unit tests (set/remove/prune).
+- sah ClaudeLocalScope tests still green.
+- `just build` + relevant `cargo nextest` green; no clippy warnings.

-Source refs:
-- sah components: apps/swissarmyhammer-cli/src/commands/install/components/mod.rs (ClaudeLocalScope ~277-408, DenyBash ~443-507)
-- shelltool registry: apps/shelltool-cli/src/commands/registry.rs
-- ShellExecuteTool lifecycle: crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/mod.rs:423-498
\ No newline at end of file
+Refs: ShellExecuteTool lifecycle crates/swissarmyhammer-tools/src/mcp/tools/shell/mod.rs:423-581; sah ClaudeLocalScope apps/swissarmyhammer-cli/src/commands/install/components/mod.rs:277-441; mirdan helpers crates/mirdan/src/mcp_config.rs:106-306.
\ No newline at end of file
